last_result: Cycle 38 complete. SI #30: Naturalistic Probe Bound — two-regime structure in I-channel P_detect reduction. Regime 1 (P_detect 0.9 → ~0.4-0.5): CPP-drivers (target specificity, reflexivity degree) partially orthogonal to P_detect-drivers (surface features, context breaks); naturalistic embedding reduces P_detect with minimal CPP cost.
